---
id: codespaces-service-get-session-logs
title: "Stream session logs"
description: "Streams logs from a session's machine. The response is a server-side stream of log chunks."
sidebar_label: "Stream session logs"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-rde-api/api-reference/bitrise-remote-dev-environments-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Stream session logs"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/workspaces/{workspaceId}/sessions/{sessionId}/logs/{stage}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Streams logs from a session's machine. The response is a server-side stream of log chunks.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
